mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO salary ( employee_id, year, month, payment_date, base_salary, overtime_allowance, commuting_allowance, health_insurance, pension, employment_insurance, income_tax, resident_tax
) VALUES ( #{employee.employeeId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{paymentDate}, #{baseSalary}, #{overtimeAllowance}, #{commutingAllowance}, #{healthInsurance}, #{pension}, #{employmentInsurance}, #{incomeTax}, #{residentTax} )

INSERT INTO salary ( employee_id, year, month, payment_date, base_salary, overtime_allowance, commuting_allowance, health_insurance, pension, employment_insurance, income_tax, resident_tax ) VALUES
( #{salary.employee.employeeId}, #{salary.year}, #{salary.month}, #{salary.paymentDate}, #{salary.baseSalary}, #{salary.overtimeAllowance}, #{salary.commutingAllowance}, #{salary.healthInsurance}, #{salary.pension}, #{salary.employmentInsurance}, #{salary.incomeTax}, #{salary.residentTax} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.mail, e.employee_code, e.duty FROM salary s JOIN employee e ON s.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE salary SET payment_date = #{paymentDate}, base_salary = #{baseSalary}, overtime_allowance = #{overtimeAllowance}, commuting_allowance = #{commutingAllowance}, health_insurance = #{healthInsurance}, pension = #{pension}, employment_insurance = #{employmentInsurance}, income_tax = #{incomeTax}, resident_tax = #{residentTax}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.mail, e.employee_code, e.duty FROM salary s JOIN employee e ON s.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE s.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY s.year DESC, s.month DESC
SELECT s.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.mail, e.employee_code, e.duty FROM salary s JOIN employee e ON s.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE s.year = #{year} AND s.month = #{month}
